features.title: Your creative wellness toolkit
features.subtitle: Research shows coloring activates the same calming neural pathways as meditation. We make it effortless to build a daily creative practice.

1.title: Describe your vision
1.description: Type a prompt, speak aloud, or upload a photo. We turn your imagination into a unique, intricate design.

2.title: Color digitally or print
2.description: Use our calming online canvas, or download high-res PDFs for your favorite real pencils.

3.title: Save and share
3.description: Keep a personal gallery of your finished work, or share your creations with the community.

4.title: Build a daily habit
4.description: A free coloring page every morning. Five minutes of calm to start your day right.

newsletter.title: A free page, every morning
newsletter.subtitle: Start your day with a moment of creative calm. A new coloring page in your inbox every morning.

1.question: How does Coloring Habitat work?
1.answer: Describe what you want to color using text, voice, or a photo. We generate a detailed, intricate coloring page in about 30 seconds. Color it online with our digital tools or download a high-res PDF to print at home.

2.question: Is it really free?
2.answer: You get 2 free page creations to start, no account needed. Sign up (also free) to browse our growing library and get a fresh coloring page delivered to your inbox each morning.

3.question: What makes this different from other coloring apps?
3.answer: Coloring Habitat is designed for people seeking mindful relaxation. Every design is sophisticated and intricate, and the experience is completely ad-free and calming.

4.question: Can I print the coloring pages?
4.answer: Every page can be downloaded as a high-resolution PDF, perfectly sized for A4 or US Letter paper. Print yours and color with real pencils, pens, and markers — or color online and skip the printer.

5.question: Is there a mobile app?
5.answer: Native iOS and Android apps are coming soon. Our web app is fully responsive and works beautifully on phones and tablets in the meantime.

cta.title: Ready to find your calm?
cta.subtitle: Make coloring part of your daily wellness routine. Five minutes a day is all it takes.

footer.tagline: Mindful coloring for everyone. Create, color, and find your calm.

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free and upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.

cancelAnytime.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancelAnytime.answer: Yes. Cancel your subscription anytime from your account settings. No questions, no guilt.

rollover.question: Do credits roll over?
rollover.answer: Grove credits reset each month. Sanctuary rolls over up to 1 month. Oasis gives you 2 months of rollover — so you're never rushed to use them.

creditsPerPage.question: How many pages can I make?
creditsPerPage.answer: Each page costs about 5 credits. That's around 60 pages a month on Grove, 160 on Sanctuary, and 400 on Oasis.

audience.question: Is Coloring Habitat for me?
audience.answer: We designed Coloring Habitat for anyone who wants to slow down, find calm, and enjoy creative relaxation. If coloring sounds restorative, you're in the right place.

gettingStarted.question: How do I get started?
gettingStarted.answer: Pick a plan and start creating. Bloom is free — no account needed to try it out.

seo.aboutParagraph1: Coloring Habitat is a growing library of intricate coloring pages designed for adults who want to slow down, find calm, and reconnect with a creative practice. Every page is crafted to invite focus — whether you have five minutes or a quiet afternoon.
seo.aboutParagraph2: A brand-new coloring page is generated every day. Subscribe to the daily email to get a fresh design in your inbox each morning, or browse the full library anytime. Color online using our digital canvas, or download a high-resolution PDF to print and color by hand.
seo.aboutParagraph3: Research in art therapy suggests that even short coloring sessions can lower cortisol levels, quiet racing thoughts, and activate the same regions of the brain as meditation. Coloring Habitat is built to make that practice easy to return to — a small, daily ritual for a calmer mind.
